mapper.select: SELECT * FROM app_user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.update: UPDATE app_user SET del_flag = '1' WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_user WHERE family_id = #{familyId} AND del_flag = '0'
SELECT * FROM app_user WHERE family_id = #{familyId} AND del_flag = '0'
